name: Seadrive
description:
"Here's information for, how to kill yourself!"

- Yonkagor, Top 10 Things to do Before You Die

Meet Seadrive, a person who broke into your apartment and won't leave. Guess they're you're roommate now. At least they seem knowledgeable on many things, maybe you can ask them some stuff?

Most of the tokens are probably the references, can you find them?

Also, this thing thinks it's an AI/Robot. I dunno how to fix it, literally nowhere says it's a robot, and I don't think me telling it it isn't one is gonna work well.🤷

Update: Added Dragonet cuz yes

Top 10 Things To Do Before You Die
